     the Fermi energy is     3.2442 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.27413455 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.6E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.28769881 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -167706.07571812 Ry
